notes: All v124 features verified. Pods section shows 15 pods with name, namespace, status, age. Delete Pod dialog works with confirm. All pages load without errors. Clean dark UI at 1920x1080.

areas.name: Dashboard
areas.notes: Loads correctly with metrics cards (nodes, pods, clusters, warning events), anomalies widget, cluster list. All zeros since mock/disconnected but UI renders perfectly.

areas.name: Clusters page
areas.notes: Shows 2 clusters (test-cluster-minikube, prod-cluster-eks) with health badges, provider, version, access level. Table is clean and sortable.

areas.name: Cluster detail - Pods section
areas.notes: NEW: Pods (15) section shows all pods with name, namespace, status (Running/Succeeded), age. Search bar included. Columns are clean and well-formatted.

areas.name: Delete Pod button
areas.notes: NEW: Trash icon on each pod row. Clicking opens confirm dialog showing namespace/pod-name, warning text, Cancel and red Delete buttons. Works as expected.

areas.name: Deployments page
areas.notes: Shows 7 deployments with namespace, replicas, version, status, rollouts. Restart and Scale buttons on each row.

areas.name: Navigation
areas.notes: Sidebar fully functional with all sections: Dashboard, Clusters, Shared Dashboards, Health, Deployments, Events, Alerts, Anomalies, Logs, AI Assistant, Feature Flags, Webhooks, Users, Audit Log, Settings, Karpenter, Teams, Permissions. All pages load.

areas.name: Alerts page
areas.notes: Loads with Alert Rules table (skeleton loading) and Recent Triggers section. Create Alert button present.

areas.name: Settings/Profile
areas.notes: Shows Cluster Connection, Platform Info (v0.1.0, Next.js 16, Operational), AI BYOK config, API Tokens, MCP Integration.
